privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real earthquake data representing the 2024 Noto Peninsula earthquake from the USGS catalog. The expected location (37.4874, 137.271), magnitude (7.5), and year (2024) constraints appropriately envelop the ground truth data imported from 'noto_earthquake.xml'. The target bulletin file path and minimum size validations have been confirmed via explicit variables in export_result.sh and verifier.py.
